item.description: Hello, my name is Xiao Ping (XP) and I’m working as part of a research group at the Future Cities Laboratory that looks at ‘ecosystem services’, which are the benefits that people gain from nature. I’m also a doctoral candidate at the National University of Singapore, Department of Architecture. My current work seeks to understand human—environment interactions and recreation behaviour using social media data. Outside of research, I enjoy playing the drums and going for adventure sports. Feel free to contact me via email or on social media if you’re interested to connect.
